# Sale Order Lot Generator

% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
% !! This file is generated by oca-gen-addon-readme !!

{{ badge1 }} {{ badge2 }} {{ badge3 }} {{ badge4 }} {{ badge5 }}

Generate automatically a lot number for each sale lines when you confirm a sale order.

**Table of contents**

```{contents}
:local: true
```

## Configuration

Go to product, inventory tab and check 'Auto Generate Lot' field.

## Usage

Create a sale order with a product with 'Auto Generate Lot' field checked.

## Bug Tracker

Bugs are tracked on [GitHub Issues](https://github.com/OCA/sale-workflow/issues).
In case of trouble, please check there if your issue has already been reported.
If you spotted it first, help us to smash it by providing a detailed and welcomed
[feedback](https://github.com/OCA/sale-workflow/issues/new?body=module:%20sale_order_lot_generator%0Aversion:%2016.0%0A%0A**Steps%20to%20reproduce**%0A-%20...%0A%0A**Current%20behavior**%0A%0A**Expected%20behavior**).

Do not contact contributors directly about support or help with technical issues.
